comments.author: Marcus T.
comments.text: I needed to read this today. I've been struggling with feeling 'trapped' by my schedule, but reframing it as scaffolding makes so much sense.

comments.author: Sarah J.
comments.text: My routine is just making my bed. It's the one thing I can control even if the rest of the day goes sideways.

comments.author: Jordan K.
comments.text: Rain sounds are honestly therapeutic. There's science behind it too — pink noise.

comments.author: Dana M.
comments.text: The 5-4-3-2-1 technique saved me during a panic attack once. It really works.
